raw.message: Five colleges. Five play styles. Find your fit and represent your school with pride.

hook.summary: Logo reveal and card flip animation.
hook.visual_action: The 'Secrets of Strixhaven' logo appears followed by a Magic card flipping to reveal its face.
hook.text_overlay: MAGIC THE GATHERING SECRETS OF STRIXHAVEN PREORDER NOW

scene_flow: Logo animation for 'Secrets of Strixhaven' appears over a stylized fantasy background.
A Magic: The Gathering card flips into the center of the frame.
The card is revealed as 'Vampiric Tutor' with unique borderless artwork.
Final static shot showing the card details and the 'PREORDER NOW' call to action.
on_screen_text: Search your library for a card, then shuffle and put that card on top. You lose 2 life.
The only true immortality comes in the passage of knowledge. Mold one mind and you can live in thousands more.
audience_proxy: Competitive and collector Magic: The Gathering players looking for premium card variants.
